ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Official name of the company */,
  "security_price" REAL /* Current price of the security */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "optionable" TEXT /* Indicates if the stock is optionable */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating volatility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the company information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company to which the price record belongs */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change from the previous day */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company paying the dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid per share */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock goes ex-dividend */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the company records shareholders eligible for the dividend */,
  "dividend_type" TEXT /* Type of dividend (e.g., cash, stock) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the dividend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, advisor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company in the portfolio */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss_percent" REAL /* Percentage profit or loss */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, NASDAQ) */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the index value was last updated */,
  "previous_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing value */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the index */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the news article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being tracked in the watchlist */,
  "note" TEXT /* User's note about the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the watchlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
